title: Weather Patterns
description: Learning about different types of weather and how to predict it.
subject: Science

prompts.input: What are three different types of weather? Describe each one.
hints: Think about sunny, rainy, and other conditions.
What does each type feel like?

prompts.input: How can you predict what the weather might be tomorrow?
hints: What tools do weather scientists use?
What clues can you look for in the sky?
